articles.title: Days after taking oath, 'humilated' Ramalinga Reddy quits Karnataka cabinet; cites 'DKS U-turn'
articles.description: Karnataka minister R Ramalinga Reddy resigned just two days after his oath, citing strong dissatisfaction with his allocated portfolio. He expressed disappointment, stating Chief Minister DK Shivakumar reneged on an assurance regarding the Bengaluru development department. Reddy affirmed his continued loyalty to the Congress party, emphasizing he would not work against his conscience.
articles.full_text: A Journalist by profession, Sandeep Moudgal has an experience of 18 years in the field with Politics and Policy as forte. He is a Senior Assistant Editor with the Bengaluru bureau and Karnataka as his jurisdiction. Has a Master's degree in Ancient History and Archaeology from Mysore University along with a PGDJ from the Asian College of Journalism. Read More

articles.title: Video: Massive fire breaks out on 12th floor of luxury high-rise in Noida
articles.description: A massive fire erupted on the 12th floor of an apartment in Noida's IVY County Society, Sector 75, causing panic among residents. Firefighters are on the scene battling the intense blaze and preventing its spread. The cause of the fire is currently unknown and under investigation.

articles.title: 'India ke liye 15 saal khelna hai': DC's 'ziddi boy' Madhav Tiwari chases big dream
articles.description: Emerging talent Madhav Tiwari, a 22-year-old from Madhya Pradesh, made a significant Indian Premier League debut for Delhi Capitals in 2026 season, showcasing his all-round abilities with both bat and ball.  Despite limited prior experience, Tiwari impressed by taking crucial wickets and playing a match-winning cameo, fueling his ambition to represent India.

articles.title: Why Google cofounders lost $10 billion each on the day Google raised $80 billion
articles.description: Google cofounders Larry Page and Sergey Brin each saw their fortunes drop by approximately $10 billion following Alphabet's announcement of an $80 billion stock sale. This massive fundraising aims to fuel the company's AI expansion amidst intensifying competition and projected significant capital expenditures. The market's reaction to the ambitious plan led to a sharp decline in Alphabet's share price.

articles.title: Putin's word of caution on India-China ties; rejects notion that Pakistan is under Beijing's control
articles.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin stated Moscow will not interfere in India-China relations, expressing confidence in Prime Minister Modi and President Xi resolving border disputes. Putin emphasized Russia's strong ties with both nations, asserting that its relationships do not negatively impact each other. He also highlighted potential defense cooperation with India.

articles.title: Candace Owens shuts down presidential rumors while pushing Tucker Carlson into the 2028 conversation
articles.description: Candace Owens said she has no interest in running for president in 2028 and joked that she would rather be a dictator. During an interview at the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum, she threw her support behind Tucker Carlson as a possible presidential candidate. Carlson has denied any plans to run, but speculation about his political future continues.

articles.title: “I regret doing it”: Sykkuno breaks silence on cheating controversy and shares emotional update on girlfriend
articles.description: Sykkuno returned to Twitch on June 3, 2026, after a break following a cheating controversy. During his comeback stream, he admitted that his actions toward his girlfriend were “horrible” and said he spent months trying to repair their relationship. He shared that they are now happier together, thanked supporters, and said the experience helped him grow.

articles.title: YouTuber Jesse Ridgway says he and wife made difficult choice after fetal Down syndrome diagnosis
articles.description: YouTuber Jesse Ridgway and his wife Ashley shared a difficult personal update. They learned their unborn child had Down syndrome during pregnancy. This led to a deeply emotional decision. The couple is now focusing on recovery and supporting each other. They expressed gratitude for fan support during this challenging time. Ridgway detailed the medical considerations that influenced their choice.

articles.title: Stock Market Live Updates Today: BSE Sensex opens over 200 points up, Nifty50 above 23,450 ahead of RBI monetary policy
Oil prices today: Crude falls as Hezbollah rejects US-backed ceasefire, traders assess conflict risks
articles.description: Oil prices saw a slight dip Friday as Middle East ceasefire hopes dimmed after Hezbollah rejected a US-backed proposal. Despite this, benchmarks are set for their first weekly gain in three weeks, buoyed by ongoing regional tensions and Strait of Hormuz disruptions. Conflicting signals from the region and declining global inventories are keeping investors cautious, suggesting continued price volatility.

ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: OJEE Result 2026 expected date and time; scorecard link to be activated on ojee.nic.in
articles.description: OJEE Result 2026: The OJEE Cell is expected to declare the OJEE Result 2026 in the second week of June 2026 on the official website. Candidates who appeared for the examination held from May 4 to May 10 can access their scorecards using their login credentials. The answer key was released on May 16, followed by an objection window until May 19. The result-cum-scorecard will display candidates’ marks and ranks for admission to undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in Odisha.

articles.title: Territorial Army Officer Recruitment 2026: When will admit card be released? Check exam pattern and marking scheme
articles.description: Territorial Army Commission Examination 2026 is scheduled for July 12. Admit cards are expected in late June or early July. The exam features a Computer-Based Test with sections on Reasoning, General Knowledge, and English, followed by a two-stage SSB interview. Merit lists will be separate for male and female candidates. Successful candidates will undergo six months of training before commissioning.
articles.full_text: Territorial Army Commission Examination 2026 is scheduled for July 12. Admit cards are expected in late June or early July. The exam features a Computer-Based Test with sections on Reasoning, General Knowledge, and English, followed by a two-stage SSB interview. Merit lists will be separate for male and female candidates. Successful candidates will undergo six months of training before commissioning.

articles.title: REET Mains Result 2026 and cut-offs released at rssb.rajasthan.gov.in; download 3rd Grade scorecard PDF here
articles.description: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) has declared the REET Mains Result 2026 for Level 2 subjects, including Hindi, English and Social Studies. The results, provisional merit lists and category-wise cut-offs are available online for candidates who appeared in the Rajasthan 3rd Grade Teacher recruitment examination conducted in January 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 7,759 vacancies. Shortlisted candidates must now complete the REET Mains Pre-DV process by submitting scrutiny forms.

articles.title: TAT HS 2026 final answer key out at sebexam.org; SEB Gujarat result expected soon
articles.description: The State Examination Board (SEB), Gujarat, has released the final answer keys for the TAT-HS Preliminary Examination 2026 on June 4. The revised keys incorporate valid objections raised against the provisional answer keys and are available for all question paper series and subjects across Hindi and English mediums. Candidates can download the subject-wise PDFs from the official portal to verify their responses. SEB is expected to announce the prelims results and category-wise cut-offs soon.

articles.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai & Bandar Movie Review and Release Live Updates
Quote of the day by Chris Hemsworth
articles.description: Chris Hemsworth, the star of 'Thor' and 'Avengers,' embodies heroism by choosing to confront challenges head-on, a philosophy he articulated as Thor Odinson. This approach, demonstrated through his career and personal life, highlights bravery not as the absence of fear, but as a deliberate decision to face problems. Hemsworth's journey from Australian actor to global icon underscores this powerful message.

articles.title: 'Top Gun' star James Handy MURDERED by girlfriend's son
articles.description: Veteran actor James Handy, known for 'Jumanji' and 'Top Gun: Maverick', was tragically murdered at his California home. Police responded to a disturbing 911 call and found Handy with multiple stab wounds. A man, identified as the son of Handy's girlfriend, has been arrested and charged with his murder. The investigation into the motive is ongoing.

articles.title: ‘Masters of the Universe’ post-credits scene LEAKED- Watch
articles.description: A leaked post-credits scene from the new 'Masters of the Universe' film has ignited fan excitement, hinting at a sequel and introducing She-Ra. The clip features a character identified as Force Captain Adora revealing her glowing Sword of Protection, confirming her transformation into the iconic Princess of Power. Actress Lauren Saliu has confirmed her cameo in the scene.
